title: Wrap ParseIntError for port parsing
scenario: Parsing configuration values should keep lower-level parse details while returning the loader error type.
instructions: Add InvalidPort(ParseIntError), implement From<ParseIntError>, and use ? in parse_port.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps config-err-parse-wrap explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
